creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
alepulver    2007-02-05 21:37:09 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    games                Makefile 
  Added files:
    games/freera         Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-message 
                         pkg-plist 
    games/freera/files   SConstruct 
  Log:
  This is a rebuild of the (westwood) red alert game engine (based
  on FreeCNC). It is a real time strategy game. To play the game with
  this engine you need the original game (mix files). The only game
  supported is red alert 1 ;)
  
  WWW: http://www.freera.org/
  
  PR:             ports/108678
  Submitted by:   Dmitry Marakasov <amdmi3 at amdmi3.ru>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1083    +1 -0      ports/games/Makefile
  1.1       +42 -0     ports/games/freera/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/games/freera/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +27 -0     ports/games/freera/files/SConstruct (new)

  1.1       +12 -0     ports/games/freera/pkg-message (new)
  1.1       +43 -0     ports/games/freera/pkg-plist (new)
